title: allow all tiers to submit apps, bot never rejects
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: No gatekeeping in the garden
gist.blurb: We've dropped the tier requirements for app submissions. Whether you're a brand new Spore or a veteran Nectar, you can now share your creations with the hive!
gist.summary: The app submission validation script has been updated to accept entries from all registered users regardless of their current tier.
gist.impact: Developers on the free tier can now submit their projects to the community showcase without being auto-rejected by the validation bot.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot opening a wooden garden gate to welcome a diverse group of tiny pixel creatures carrying little app icons and floppy disks. Represents removing barriers and welcoming all submissions.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny sunhat and a chunky monitor-head robot opening a wooden garden gate to welcome a line of tiny pixel creatures holding floppy disks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
